title: Anvil (disambiguation)
content:
'''Anvil''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*'''''[[Anvil]]''''', a [[Kilji war cruiser]] [[Commander|commanded]] by [[General]] [[Crofyp]] of the [[Kilji Illumine]] nation.
*'''[[Anvil Squadron]]''', a [[New Republic]] [[starfighter]] [[squadron]].
**'''[[Anvil Leader]]''', the leader of Anvil Squadron.
***[[Anvil Leader (pilot)|'''Anvil Leader''']], a [[pilot]] who held that [[callsign]].

==Legends==
*'''''[[Anvil (Acclamator-class)|Anvil]]''''', an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]].
*'''''[[Anvil (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|Anvil]]''''', an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].
*'''[[Anvilstone]]''', a type of rock.
*'''''[[Hell's Anvil]]'''''
*'''[[StarAnvil heavy blaster rifle]]'''
*'''[[Void Anvil]]'''

{{Disambig}}
